node_7.subject: Maria Lopez
node_7.description: This is Maria Lopez's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 10:00 am, get dressed and have breakfast at 10:30 am, head to Hobbs Cafe to study for her physics classes from 11:00 am to 2:00 pm, return home to take a break and relax until 3:00 pm, begin streaming on Twitch from 3:00 pm to 6:00 pm, connecting with her audience and playing popular games, take a dinner break at 7:00 pm, enjoying a meal while perhaps catching up on some YouTube videos or gaming news.
